registry_boundary.consumer_boundary: Core may resolve package identity and local manifest paths from this index. The index does not publish, install, execute, sync, or choose runtime/profile/provider state.

sample_read_package.consumer_boundary: Core may consume this entry as the first sample read package reference after GH-102 fixture consumption checks. This selection does not imply hosted registry, runtime execution, stable admission, or write behavior.

resolution.freshness_rule: Revalidate if package_ref, package_path, manifest_path, lock_path, capability identity, version, lifecycle, or declared asset roles change.

non_goals: No package installation, publishing, or update flow.
No runtime execution, provider/profile selection, live tab binding, or write capability.
